assessment.note: She wants a bigger-scope conversation sooner, which signals current uncertainty about near-term direction and a felt gap in growth opportunity. [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'bigger scope conversation' could be worth unpacking next session.

new_queue.label: Launch leverage
new_queue.name: What do you want this launch to change for you over the next few months?
new_queue.description: Explores how she wants recognition and impact from the ship to translate into leverage.
